ic7000-ci-v.description: Icom CI-V protocol with IC-7000 compatibility mode. X6100 implements a subset of IC-7000 CI-V commands.

evidence.description: X6100 Extended Manual - Serial communication parameters
Community reports on CI-V subset limitations

provenance.notes: Official documentation does not provide complete CI-V command subset list. CAT capabilities inferred from Hamlib implementation and community testing.

evidence.description: X6100 Extended Manual - PTT control methods
X6100 Extended Manual - USB audio configuration

provenance.notes: X6100 implements CI-V protocol in IC-7000 compatibility mode. Official documentation provides partial CI-V command coverage; complete subset requires Hamlib source or community verification.

usb_audio_fix.notes: Earlier firmware versions may have USB audio dropouts during digital mode operation

known_issues.title: CI-V mode-switch response delay
known_issues.description: When switching operating modes via CI-V, the X6100 may exhibit response delays of 200-500ms before the mode change is reflected. This can cause timing issues in automated CAT sequences.
known_issues.workaround: Add 500ms delay after mode-switch commands before sending subsequent CAT queries.

known_issues.title: CI-V address not configurable
known_issues.description: The X6100 uses a fixed CI-V address and does not support address configuration. This may cause conflicts when multiple Icom-compatible radios are on the same CI-V bus.
known_issues.workaround: Use separate serial interfaces for each radio when operating multiple CI-V devices.

known_issues.title: Incomplete IC-7000 command compatibility
known_issues.description: While X6100 advertises IC-7000 CI-V compatibility, not all IC-7000 commands are implemented. Commands for IF filter control, AGC settings, and some metering functions are missing or behave differently.
known_issues.workaround: Verify command support against Hamlib backend source or test manually before relying on specific CI-V commands.

known_issues.title: Firmware update resets CAT settings
known_issues.description: After firmware updates, CAT/serial communication settings may reset to defaults. Users should verify and reconfigure baud rate and other serial parameters after updates.
known_issues.workaround: Document CAT settings before firmware updates and verify after restart.

recommendations.notes: Use 19200 baud for optimal CI-V responsiveness. Enable RTS PTT for digital modes to avoid CAT PTT timing issues. Hamlib rigctld recommended for command abstraction.

evidence.description: Hamlib X6100 backend source code and wiki

provenance.notes: Official CI-V command subset documentation is partial. Community-verified issues require independent validation. Known issues tagged with appropriate confidence levels.
